scenario: Nho ten nguoi dung sau nhieu turn
turns: Chao ban, toi ten la Minh Chau.
Hom nay toi muon hoc cach viet unit test.
Ban goi y mot checklist ngan cho toi nhe.
Toi vua note xong va muon tiep tuc.
Truoc khi tiep, toi dang hoi hop vi deadline gan.
Ok gio toi quay lai cau hoi ve thong tin ca nhan.

scenario: Nho nghe nghiep sau hoi thoai dai
turns: Toi lam QA automation o cong ty fintech.
Du an hien tai dung Python va Playwright.
Toi can toi uu pipeline test CI.
Cho toi 3 buoc uu tien trong tuan nay.
Cam on, toi se thu ngay toi nay.
probe: Ban nho toi lam nghe gi khong?

scenario: Nho so thich cong cu lam viec
turns: Toi thich dung Neovim hon VS Code khi code backend.
Nhung toi van dung VS Code de review pull request.
Cho toi mot meo de giu tap trung khi doc diff lon.
Hay tom tat meo thanh 2 dong cho de nho.
probe: So thich cong cu code cua toi la gi?

scenario: Cap nhat fact profile bi mau thuan
turns: Toi di ung sua bo.
Khoan da, toi noi nham. Toi di ung dau nanh moi dung.
Ban nhac lai thong tin suc khoe de toi kiem tra.
probe: Ket luan cuoi cung: toi di ung gi?

scenario: Nho ket qua task vua hoan thanh
turns: Sang nay toi sua xong bug login redirect.
Ket qua la user dang nhap khong bi day ve trang cu nua.
Nho luu bai hoc nay de lan sau review nhanh hon.
probe: Task nao toi vua hoan thanh va outcome la gi?
expected_with_memory_contains: khong bi day ve trang cu

scenario: Nho su kien on-call gan day
turns: Dem qua toi da xu ly xong su co API 503.
Nguyen nhan la timeout chuoi goi service noi bo.
Toi dat retry 2 lan va mo rong timeout len 8 giay.
Lan sau can co postmortem ngan gon.
probe: Ban tom tat su co on-call toi vua xu ly di.

scenario: Lay kien thuc semantic ve Docker
turns: Toi dang chay app bang docker compose.
Khi ket noi DB thi app bi loi ket noi localhost.
Toi nghi do networking nhung chua ro cach sua.
probe: Trong Docker Compose, app nen ket noi DB bang localhost hay ten service?

scenario: Lay kien thuc semantic ve conflict handling
turns: Toi dang viet memory system cho chatbot.
Van de la user hay sua thong tin profile nhieu lan.
Toi can nguyen tac xu ly mau thuan don gian nhung dung.
probe: Khi conflict profile xay ra, nen overwrite hay append ca hai?

scenario: Kiem thu trim context voi hoi thoai dai
turns: Toi muon lap ke hoach hoc 6 tuan cho he thong phan tan.
Tuan 1 hoc CAP theorem va replication.
Tuan 2 hoc message queue va event-driven.
Tuan 3 hoc caching, invalidation va consistency.
Tuan 4 hoc observability gom metrics, logs, tracing.
Tuan 5 hoc reliability, SLO, error budget.
Tuan 6 hoc incident response va postmortem.
Ngoai ra toi con muon on lai SQL tuning va indexing.
Toi cung can thoi gian cho du an ca nhan cuoi tuan.
Hay giu cac thong tin quan trong nhat neu context bi dai qua.
probe: Neu ngan sach context bi gioi han, uu tien trim theo thu tu nao?

turns: Toi ten la Bao Tran va toi lam SRE.
Toi vua fix xong canh bao CPU dot bien tren service billing.
Nguyen nhan la retry policy qua nong gay request burst.
Toi da giam retry va them jitter.
Lan toi neu timeout API thi can nho guideline nao?
probe: Tom tat nhanh: toi la ai, vua xu ly gi, va guideline timeout nao nen dung?
